# SherpaOnnx runtime

Bundled from k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx release v1.13.3 asset:
https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/v1.13.3/sherpa-onnx-v1.13.3-osx-arm64-shared-no-tts.tar.bz2

Included files:
- bin/sherpa-onnx-offline
- lib/libonnxruntime.1.24.4.dylib
- lib/libonnxruntime.dylib symlink

Used for local offline SenseVoice and NVIDIA Parakeet file transcription paths in the app and CLI.
